untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) Implied Volatility levels which are not in the allowed indicator set - only historical volatility (hvol_20) and VIX proxy (india_vix) available; (2) Delta-aligned directional bias requires options chain analysis and delta values not available; (3) Specific delta_tolerance threshold parameter cannot be operationalized without direct delta indicators; (4) IV reversion detection requires explicit IV data not present in price/technical indicators only
